title: 7 herbal creams for subfertile men with low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Tribulus terrestris creams are often recommended for men with low sperm count due to their potential to improve fertility. The creams typically contain the plant extract's main compound, protodioscin, which is believed to stimulate the testes to produce more testosterone. Testosterone is essential for sperm production, so an increase in this hormone can lead to higher sperm count.  To use Tribulus terrestris creams, apply a small amount to the skin, usually the arms or legs, and gently massage it in. The cream is usually absorbed quickly into the skin.  When using Tribulus terrestris creams, men with low sperm count may experience an increase in sperm count and motility. They may also notice improvements in libido and fertility. However, results may vary depending on individual circumstances and the effectiveness of the specific cream used.  It's essential to consult a doctor before using any new supplement or cream, especially if you're experiencing fertility issues. They can provide personalized advice and help you determine the best course of action.
remedies.image_alt: Tribulus terrestris herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera creams have gained attention for their potential benefits in addressing low sperm count. This is attributed to the presence of compounds like withanolides, alkaloids, and glycosides, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These constituents may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the testes, thereby promoting healthy sperm production.  If you're considering trying Withania somnifera creams for low sperm count, it's recommended to consult with a healthcare professional first. They can help determine the best course of action and ensure that the cream is used safely.  Once you've received a green light, you can apply the cream to the affected area as directed. You may need to apply it twice a day, gently massaging it into your skin.  As you start using the cream, you may notice improvements in sperm count and quality over time. This could be due to the reduction in oxidative stress and inflammation, allowing your testes to function more efficiently. However, results may vary, and it's essential to be patient and consistent with your treatment. Regular check-ups with your healthcare provider will help monitor your progress and make any necessary adjustments to your treatment plan.
remedies.image_alt: Withania somnifera herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Lepidium meyenii creams, also known as Maca root cream, have been traditionally used to help with fertility issues, particularly low sperm count. The cream contains bioactive compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to stimulate the production of testosterone and improve sperm quality. Maca root has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help protect the reproductive system from damage.  If you're considering using Lepidium meyenii creams for low sperm count, here are some steps you can take: First, consult with a healthcare professional to discuss the potential benefits and risks of using Maca root. They may recommend a specific dosage or cream formulation for your needs. You can apply the cream topically to the affected area, such as the base of the penis, or take it orally in capsule or powder form. It's essential to follow the recommended dosage and usage instructions. When using Lepidium meyenii creams, you may notice improvements in sperm count and motility within a few weeks to a few months. Some people report increased libido, improved mood, and enhanced overall fertility. However, it's essential to remember that individual results may vary, and more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of Maca root for low sperm count. To get the best results, you should also maintain a healthy lifestyle, including a balanced diet, regular exercise, and stress management.
remedies.image_alt: Lepidium meyenii herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba creams have gained attention in recent years for their potential benefits in addressing low sperm count. The key lies in the plant's unique properties and constituents, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to improve blood flow to the genital area. This enhanced circulation is believed to increase the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to the testicles, thereby supporting sperm production and motility. The flavonoids in Ginkgo biloba also have antioxidant properties, which help to protect sperm from damage caused by free radicals. If you're considering using Ginkgo biloba creams for low sperm count, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before making any decisions. They can help you determine the best course of action and recommend a reputable brand. When selecting a cream, look for products that contain standardized Ginkgo biloba extract (24-30% flavone glycosides and 6-12% terpene lactones) and follow the instructions carefully. Start with a small amount (about 1-2 grams per day) and gradually increase as needed. Taking Ginkgo biloba creams as directed may lead to improved sperm count and motility over time. Some people may experience an increase in sperm concentration and a reduction in DNA fragmentation. However, it's essential to note that individual results may vary, and Ginkgo biloba creams may not work for everyone. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba creams are not a substitute for medical treatment, and you should continue to work with your healthcare provider to address underlying fertility issues.
remedies.image_alt: Ginkgo biloba herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Asparagus racemosus creams have been traditionally used to help with low sperm count due to their rich properties and constituents. The cream contains compounds like asparagine, saponins, and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These properties may help protect the reproductive system, improve sperm quality, and increase sperm count. Asparagus racemosus creams may also help to improve blood flow to the reproductive organs, which can aid in the production of sperm. If you're considering using Asparagus racemosus creams for low sperm count, here's what you can do: consult with a healthcare professional or a qualified practitioner to discuss your options and determine the best course of treatment. They may recommend a specific brand or product, and guide you on how to use it correctly. It's essential to follow their advice and use the cream as directed. When taking Asparagus racemosus creams, you can expect some positive changes. Improved sperm quality and increased sperm count may be noticeable after a few weeks of consistent use. Additionally, you may experience enhanced fertility and a reduced risk of infertility. However, it's essential to be patient and persistent, as the effects may take some time to manifest. Regular check-ups with your healthcare professional will help monitor your progress and make any necessary adjustments to your treatment plan.
remedies.image_alt: Asparagus racemosus herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Ocimum sanctum creams, also known as holy basil creams, have been used in Ayurvedic medicine for centuries to boost fertility in men, particularly those with low sperm count. This is due to its high content of antioxidants like eugenol, ursolic acid, and rosmarinic acid, which help protect sperm cells from damage and oxidative stress. The creams also contain flavonoids, such as apigenin and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory properties and can improve sperm motility and quality.  To use Ocimum sanctum creams for low sperm count, you can apply a small amount to the affected area (usually the base of the penis) and massage it gently for a few minutes. It's recommended to use the creams in combination with a healthy lifestyle, including a balanced diet, regular exercise, and stress management. For best results, use the creams consistently for at least 3-6 months.  Using Ocimum sanctum creams may lead to improved sperm count and motility, increased fertility, and better overall reproductive health. However, it's essential to note that individual results may vary, and this cream should not be used as a replacement for medical treatment. Consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement or treatment, especially if you're already undergoing fertility treatments.
remedies.image_alt: Ocimum sanctum herbal creams for low sperm count

remedies.remedy_desc: Eurycoma longifolia creams have been gaining attention for their potential to help with low sperm count. This is due to the presence of a compound called eurycomanone, which has been shown to have a positive effect on sperm quality and quantity. Eurycoma longifolia creams also contain other beneficial properties such as antioxidants, which help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. The constituent quassinoids in Eurycoma longifolia creams have been found to improve sperm motility and morphology, which are essential for successful fertilization. If you're experiencing low sperm count, consider incorporating Eurycoma longifolia creams into your daily routine. Start by applying a small amount to the affected area, ideally 1-2 times a day. You can also consider consulting with a healthcare professional or a registered herbalist for personalized guidance. Be patient and consistent, as results may take time to manifest.  When taking action, you can expect to see improvements in sperm quality and quantity within 2-6 months of regular use. Some people may experience enhanced fertility and increased libido due to the aphrodisiac properties of Eurycoma longifolia creams. However, individual results may vary, and it's essential to maintain realistic expectations. Regular use and patience are key to experiencing the potential benefits of Eurycoma longifolia creams.

intro_desc: For men struggling with subfertility, low sperm count can be a major issue. It's often a result of hormonal imbalances, lifestyle choices, or underlying health conditions. When sperm count is low, it can be difficult for couples to conceive. This can lead to stress, anxiety, and feelings of frustration and disappointment. Subfertile men may feel like they're losing control over their reproductive health, and it can affect their self-esteem and confidence. They may also worry about the impact on their relationships, as the pressure to conceive can put a strain on their partnerships. Low sperm count can also lead to feelings of isolation and loneliness, as they may feel like they're the only ones dealing with this issue.  Subfertile men may also experience other symptoms like erectile dysfunction, premature ejaculation, or low libido. These symptoms can further exacerbate the stress and anxiety they're already feeling. In some cases, low sperm count can be a sign of an underlying health issue, such as a hormonal imbalance or a condition like varicocele. If left untreated, these conditions can lead to further complications and make it even harder to conceive.  Fortunately, there are some alternative treatments that can help subfertile men improve their sperm count. Herbal creams have been shown to have a positive impact on sperm health. These creams are made from natural ingredients that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to improve sperm quality and count. They can also help to boost testosterone levels and improve overall reproductive health. By using these creams, subfertile men can take a proactive approach to addressing their low sperm count and improving their chances of conception.
intro_image_alt: herbal creams for low sperm count
